title: Implement Cryptographically Secure Session Token Generation
description: Replace current session token generation with cryptographically secure random number generator to prevent session prediction attacks.
acceptance_criteria: Session tokens generated using secrets.token_urlsafe(32) or equivalent
Minimum 256 bits of entropy per token
Token rotation implemented on privilege changes
Unit tests verify token randomness and uniqueness
testing_requirements: Statistical randomness test on 10,000 generated tokens

title: Implement Session Expiration and Timeout Mechanism
description: Add automatic session expiration with idle timeout and absolute timeout to reduce session hijacking risk.
testing_requirements: Verify session expires after 30 min inactivity
Verify session expires after 24 hours regardless of activity
Test session refresh extends timeout correctly
Verify cleanup job removes expired sessions

title: Add Rate Limiting to Authentication Endpoints
description: Implement rate limiting on login and registration endpoints to prevent brute force attacks.
acceptance_criteria: Rate limit: 5 login attempts per 15 minutes per IP
429 status code with Retry-After header returned
testing_requirements: Automated test: 6 rapid login attempts blocked
Verify rate limit resets after timeout
Load test: rate limiting doesn't affect legitimate users

title: Implement Comprehensive API Input Validation
description: Add strict input validation schemas for all API endpoints to prevent injection and invalid data.
acceptance_criteria: JSON schema validation for all endpoints

title: Configure Secure CORS and CSRF Protection
description: Implement proper CORS configuration and CSRF token protection for state-changing operations.
acceptance_criteria: CORS limited to explicit allowed origins (no wildcards)
credentials: true only for trusted origins

title: Implement Global API Rate Limiting
description: Add rate limiting to all API endpoints to prevent DoS attacks and resource exhaustion.
acceptance_criteria: Burst protection with token bucket algorithm
testing_requirements: Load test: verify limits enforced under load

title: Enforce Server-Side Game State Validation
description: Move all game state validation to server-side to prevent cheating and ensure game integrity.
testing_requirements: Test invalid moves rejected (wrong turn, occupied cell)
Test client cannot manipulate game state
Integration tests for complete game flows
Penetration test: attempt to cheat via API

title: Add Game State Integrity Protection and Encryption
description: Implement HMAC signatures and encryption for stored game state to prevent tampering and protect privacy.
acceptance_criteria: HMAC-SHA256 signatures on all game state records
Sensitive player data encrypted at rest (AES-256)
Audit log for all state modifications
testing_requirements: Verify audit logs capture all changes
Test key rotation doesn't break existing data
